sources.label: Alchip Q1 2026 financial results (May 27, pre-window; H2-weighted 2026, 3nm AI accelerator ramp, 2nm tapeout by year-end)
TradingView 3661.TW quote/news (no fresh catalysts June 6-9; ATH 5,640 TWD on May 12, stock ~25% below)

verdicts.rankRationale: No new evidence since June 6 and yesterday's verdict was hold; the ~25% retracement from the May 12 high with the 3nm/2nm custom-ASIC thesis intact modestly rebuilds residual alpha, but today's +1.9% bounce is flow, not news, so rank 9 stands.
verdicts.bull: 3nm AI accelerator enters high-volume production in Q2 with ~80% of 2026 revenue in H2, plus a 2nm tapeout by year-end giving multi-year custom-silicon visibility; the pullback from 5,640 to 4,250 TWD restores entry asymmetry.
verdicts.neutral: Q1 revenue of $132.4M (down sharply y/y) confirms the air-pocket between programs; the H2 ramp is well-flagged by 13 buy ratings, so the setup is a known catalyst, not hidden alpha.
verdicts.bear: Customer concentration on a single North American accelerator program means any schedule slip or share loss to rival ASIC houses craters the H2-weighted guidance.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2/Q3 monthly revenue confirming the 3nm AI accelerator volume ramp
verdicts.primaryRisk: Slip or downsizing of the lead hyperscaler 3nm program given extreme customer concentration

verdicts.rankRationale: On this CPO-lens page Alchip's optical attach remains indirect and nothing since June 6 changes that; sell-off from the May high slightly improves asymmetry but yesterday's hold at the already-lowered rank 7 is still right.
verdicts.bull: As hyperscaler custom ASICs move to 2nm and scale-up fabrics, Alchip sits upstream of every co-packaged optics decision its customers make, with NRE from the 2nm tapeout landing by year-end.
verdicts.neutral: The CPO linkage is second-derivative — Alchip monetizes the ASIC, not the optical engine — so CPO news flow shouldn't rerate it on this page either way.
verdicts.bear: If lead customers integrate optics via partners that pull more of the package design in-house, Alchip's content per system could stagnate while pure CPO names capture the rerating.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: 2nm accelerator tapeout and associated NRE recognition by end-2026
verdicts.primaryRisk: AI project timing and customer concentration overwhelming the indirect optical-attach angle
